title: Volere Agentic Requirement Card
description: Machine-readable Volere snow card for agentic software development

id.description: Unique requirement identifier. Prefix: BUC (business use case), PUC (product use case), UR (user requirement), TC (technical constraint), SHR (stakeholder), SEC (security catalog)

type.description: Volere requirement type: business-use-case (§7), product-use-case (§8), functional (§9), non-functional (§10-17), or technical-constraint for derived requirements

description.description: One-sentence statement of what the system must do

rationale.description: Why this requirement exists — the real-world pain that created it

fit_criteria.description: Multi-dimensional acceptance criteria. At least one dimension required.

dal.description: Design Assurance Level. A=catastrophic, B=critical, C=moderate, D=minor, E=cosmetic

satisfaction.description: Stakeholder happiness if implemented (1=uninterested, 5=extremely pleased). Kano model.

dissatisfaction.description: Stakeholder unhappiness if missing (1=hardly matters, 5=extremely displeased). Kano model.

date.description: When the requirement was created (ISO 8601 date)

trigger.description: What event or pain triggered this requirement

source.description: Parent requirement ID this was derived from (e.g., UR-007)

serves.description: For TCs only — which UR(s) this technical constraint serves

depends_on.description: Requirements that must be satisfied for this one to work

conflicts.description: Requirements that cannot be implemented if this one is

test_type.description: Type of test when verification is 'test'

lab.description: Required test lab when test_type is 'lab-test'

evidence.description: Type of evidence artifact produced (e.g., test-report)
